title: selaginella ledermannii
intro: Selaginella ledermannii, also known as Spike Moss, is a type of evergreen plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its creeping stems and small, scale-like leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Selaginella ledermannii include reducing pain and inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance their effects.
